showImportDialog.name: Show Welcome Dialog
showImportDialog.hint: Show the welcome splash screen when loading a world. Disable this if you don't want to be prompted.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: Enable debug logging to the browser console.

sigilMapEnabled.name: Sigil Investigation Map
sigilMapEnabled.hint: Enable the interactive investigation map overlay on the Sigil scene.

sigilMapSounds.name: Sigil Map Sound Effects
sigilMapSounds.hint: Play sound effects when locations are revealed on the Sigil map.

sigilMapAnimations.name: Sigil Map Animations
sigilMapAnimations.hint: Show animated effects when locations are revealed on the Sigil map.

customizeLogin.label: Customize Login Screen
customizeLogin.hint: Update the world login page with Harbinger House artwork and description

displayJournal.label: Display Intro Journal
displayJournal.hint: Open the adventure's introductory journal after import

activateScene.label: Activate Starting Scene
activateScene.hint: Set the First Floor map as the active scene after import

sigilMap.revealModeHint: Click markers to advance their reveal state
sigilMap.resetAllConfirm: Reset all location markers to hidden? This cannot be undone.

warnings.activateBestiaryBeforeImport: Pathfinder Token Pack: Bestiaries is installed but inactive. Activate it before running the Harbinger House importer.

errors.pf2eRequired: This module requires the Pathfinder 2e system.
